text:
On Wed, 26 Dec 2007 16:47:20 -0200
Renato Botelho <garga@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Any news about this?

In regards to stopping it, tcpserver, the best thing to due is
generally try to bludgeon it to death using killall. Unfortunately it
is not possible of getting it's PID due to logger being the last
thing ran.
